source_note: Ark. Code § 27-67-227(b) designates Highway 17 from Dyess to Wilson as the Johnny Cash Memorial Highway.
Ark. Code § 27-67-227(c) designates U.S. 49 from Marvell to Helena as the Levon Helm Memorial Highway.
Ark. Code § 27-67-227(d) designates U.S. 49 from Brinkley to Marvell as the Louis Jordan Memorial Highway.
Ark. Code § 27-67-227(e) designates Highway 17 from Cotton Plant to Brinkley as the Sister Rosetta Tharpe Memorial Highway.
Ark. Code § 27-67-227(f) designates U.S. 61 from West Memphis to Blytheville as the Americana Music Highway.
